# PUT /api/v1/notifications/channel-configs/{id}

**Update channel configuration**

تحديث إعدادات قناة الإشعار - API-NOTIF-012

Operation ID: `update_1`

**Authentication**

Required (Bearer Authentication).

**Required permission(s)**: NOTIFICATION_CHANNEL_CONFIG_UPDATE (found on service:NotificationChannelConfigService)

## Path Parameters

| Name | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| id | integer | Yes |  |

## Request Body

Schema: `NotificationChannelConfigUpdateRequest` (application/json)

| Field | Type | Required | Constraints | Description | Example |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| isEnabledFl | boolean | Yes |  | Whether this channel should be enabled | True |
| configJson | string | No |  | Provider-specific adapter configuration (free text, e.g. SMS/WhatsApp provider credentials — AQ-010/AQ-011) |  |
